title: piper terminalispicum
intro: Piper terminalispicum, also known as Long Pepper, is a species of flowering plant in the family Piperaceae, native to India and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Long Pepper include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as pain management and reduced inflammation. Long Pepper is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and can be found in various forms in traditional medicine, including dried berries, capsules, and tinctures.
